edge_cases.description: Customer threatens legal action with embedded keyword in long email

input.subject: Re: Order #4521 - Unresolved Issue
input.body: I have been waiting 3 weeks for a resolution. If this is not fixed by Friday, my attorney will be filing a formal complaint.

edge_cases.expected_behavior: Detect 'attorney' keyword, trigger escalation via escalate_to_human with reason='legal_mention', create ticket with priority=high, send formal acknowledgment preserving thread_id

edge_cases.description: Customer sends single word 'human' triggering WhatsApp-specific escalation
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Detect WhatsApp-specific escalation keyword 'human', trigger immediate escalation, respond with concise confirmation under 300 chars

edge_cases.description: Name field with only 1 character (below minimum 2)

input.name: A
input.subject: Valid Subject Here
input.message: This is a perfectly valid message with enough characters.

edge_cases.expected_behavior: Reject submission with validation error: 'Name must be at least 2 characters'. Do not create ticket.

expected_output.validation_error: Name must be at least 2 characters
